steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence emphasizing a similarity between Crocodile Lake NWR and Pearl Harbor NWR. The notes state both were established to protect a specific endangered species — that shared founding purpose is the key similarity.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — both refuges were established to protect an endangered species: directly states what both refuges share, using "Both" to link them. ✓
  • Choice B: discusses only one of the two refuges. ✗
  • Choice C: emphasizes a difference (size) rather than a similarity. ✗
  • Choice D: discusses only one of the two refuges. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
